Description About This Product Introducing the modern rectangular coffee table with shelf- a harmonious blend of style and practicality, designed to elevate your living space. Crafted meticulously from solid pine wood, this modern coffee table for the living room with underneath storage ensures both durability and timeless elegance. Its use of non-toxic finishes not only ensures a safe environment but also reflects a commitment to eco-conscious craftsmanship. The distinctive finish creates a textured look that adds depth and uniqueness to the center table's design, making it a standout piece in any room. This attention to detail sets it apart

Earn $15.75 in rewards, with 5% back¹, plus more exclusive perks Earn $15.75 in rewards, with 5% back¹, plus more exclusive perks Learn more Services Professional Assembly - $89.99 See Details 5 Year Protection Plan - $52.99 ($10.60/year) See Details Get Everything You Need Sale Burke Square Manufactured Wood Serving Tray with Handles Add to Cart Larenda Entryway Table with Open Shelf Storage Add to Cart Four-Day Flash Sale Lorraine TV Stand with Sliding Barn Doors Add to Cart Sale Round Furniture Pads for Slider (Set of 128) Add to Cart At a Glance Solid Wood Base Storage Included Warranty Length: 1 Year Solid Wood See More Description About This Product Introducing the modern rectangular coffee table with shelf- a harmonious blend of style and practicality, designed to elevate your living space. Crafted meticulously from solid pine wood, this modern coffee table for the living room with underneath storage ensures both durability and timeless elegance. Its use of non-toxic finishes not only ensures a safe environment but also reflects a commitment to eco-conscious craftsmanship. The distinctive finish creates a textured look that adds depth and uniqueness to the center table's design, making it a standout piece in any room. This attention to detail sets it apart, ideal for those seeking sophistication in their home decor. Designed with versatility in mind, this medium-sized coffee table measures 40.75 inches in length, and 20.25 inches in width, and stands at 15 inches in height. Its sleek rectangular shape maximizes surface area, catering perfectly to smaller living spaces while offering ample room for various seating arrangements. Practicality meets style with the inclusion of a bottom shelf, offering opportunities for storage or displaying your favorite decor pieces. From storing books and magazines to showcasing decorative accents, this shelf amplifies the table's functionality without compromising its sleek aesthetics. Embrace modern design with the modern rectangular coffee table with a shelf - an exquisite addition that seamlessly integrates into your living area, providing both style and utility in a single, sophisticated package. Features Quality wood coffee table with shelf: The rectangular coffee table with storage features a solid pine wood tabletop and legs offering a refined look and exceptional durability. The solid wood 2-tier coffee table for the living room with non-toxic finishes complements your healthy living space. Versatile design: The modern occasional table for the living room has a unique design that allows for easy accommodation in smaller living spaces, making it an exceptional and practical addition to enhance the ambiance of any home. Modern style: Our wooden small tea table with a shelf boasts a sleek, modern design that exudes contemporary elegance, creating an inviting focal point for cherished family gatherings. Enhanced by a wire brush finish, they showcase a unique textured look for added flair. Assembly: The medium-sized coffee table for small space is easily assembled anywhere in your room, accompanied by user-friendly instructions. Conveniently, the modern occasional table for the living room arrives in a single box. Dimensions: The rectangular center table measures 40.25" L x 20.5" W x 15" H. Many appreciate the solid wood and its stylish finish. However, some found the size smaller than expected, and a few noted concerns about the material's susceptibility to damage from moisture.
